name: claude-toolkit
description: Reusable Claude Code hooks and skills — install only the pieces you want.

plugins.name: auto-approve-permissions
plugins.description: PreToolUse hook: auto-approve read-only / inspection Bash commands (and WebSearch/WebFetch) while still prompting for anything that writes, deletes, modifies, or calls an external service.

plugins.name: house-modeler
plugins.description: Turn hand-drawn or photographed floor plans into accurate 2D plans (SVG) + an interactive walkable 3D model (Three.js) from one source of truth. Walls/doors/windows, areas, furnishing to clearance standards, plot, levels, sun-by-latitude, roofs; friendly interview for non-coders.
